'''Sembric Skamini''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as the proprietor of an ore prospecting launch base on [[Mon Gazza/Legends|Mon Gazza]], along with his wife [[Ashielle Skamini]] and was the father of [[Zett Jukassa/Legends|Warpoc Skamini]], who became [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] Zett Jukassa.

He and his wife were murdered by [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] operatives seven years after the birth of Zett Jukassa. Zett sensed the murder through [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], and was involved in the investigation with his master, [[Mierme Unill]]. The murderers were captured and sentenced.

{{Char-stub}}
